name: io.github.bidda-ai/bidda-compliance
description: 7243 cryptographically-verified regulatory compliance nodes across 34 pillars. Zero hallucination MCP server — every node traces to a primary legal source with avg 7 citations. Covers EU AI Act, GDPR, HIPAA, DORA, Basel III, FATF, NIS2, NIST AI RMF, ISO 27001, MiCA and 150+ frameworks. Also includes 1,185 MITRE nodes (ATT&CK Enterprise/Mobile/ICS, D3FEND, ATLAS, CAPEC). No API key required for discovery tier.
